title: Prometheus, the industrial AI startup from Jeff Bezos, is now worth $41 billion
sentences: Prometheus, the industrial AI startup from Jeff Bezos, is now worth $41 billion Prometheus, the industrial AI startup led by Jeff Bezos and former Google exec Vik Bajaj, today will announce that it's raised $12 billion in Series B funding at a $41 billion valuation.

entities.label: ORG
